name: Keskisuomalainen Oyj
summary: Keskisuomalainen Oyj publishes print and online newspapers and magazines in Finland. The company also provides printing services for magazines, newspapers, direct mail products, attachments, brochures, posters, and books. In addition, it offers marketing and communications services; digital content production solutions, as well as digital media; and research services. The company was founded in 1871 and is based in Jyv√É¬§skyl√É¬§, Finland.
